nasb.text: “When Your people go out to battle against their enemy, by whatever way You shall send them, and they pray to the Lord toward the city which You have chosen and the house which I have built for Your name,

esv.text: “If your people go out to battle against their enemy, by whatever way you shall send them, and they pray to the Lord  toward the city that you have chosen and the house that I have built for your name,

cnv.text: “如果你的子民出去與仇敵爭戰，無論你派他們到哪處，他們若是向你所揀選的這城，並向我為你的名建造的這殿禱告，

ccb.text: “你的子民奉你的命令上阵与敌人作战，无论他们在哪里，如果他们向着你选择的这城和我为你建造的这殿祷告，
